name: Material Salvage Report
query:
SELECT
    name,
    property,
    material_name,
    material_category,
    quantity,
    condition,
    status
FROM `tabMaterial Salvage`
WHERE docstatus < 2
{% if filters.material_category %}
  AND material_category = %(material_category)s
{% endif %}
{% if filters.status %}
  AND status = %(status)s
{% endif %}
ORDER BY modified DESC
